Hello, is it possible to arrange a van-taxi for 6 people at 10:00 am today?

Thank you.

[NAVER Maps]
Unni Guide 언니가이드
서울 강남구 논현동 165-3

OkayI will arrange two taxis for you, just like yesterday. Is that alright with you?
It’d be nice to get one big taxi if possible.
We can book a private van for 60,000 won, you'd need to pay the driver directly in cash. Would you like to go with that?"
Nope, a van-taxi or two taxis will do, thanks.
​I’ll try to call a van taxi first, but if it takes too long and fails, I’ll just call two regular taxis for you
Let me arrange the van for you. Please hold on a moment.
Unfortunately, a van is not available right now. I will arrange two taxis for you instead. Is that fine? Just let me know when you're ready.
Okay, will do.

120363410881167904@g.us.text:
Main Gate Pin 0 2 1 8 *
(*Please make sure once again the main gate closed properly for residence security 🙏*)

The neighborhood information (with Naver Map Link)
*Please sign up Naver, and download Navermap app, and save our list in the app! very useful insight you will have to understand your neighborhood very quickly*

📌 Essential Information

Address — 97‑1 Duteopbawi‑ro, Yongsan‑gu, Seoul 04336

Main Entrance Code — 0 2 1 8 * → Always check that it relocks after every in/out

Your Suite & ARA(1F) Door Code — Check‑in date in the format YYMMDD + *

Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

🧳 Luggage Storage Space (1F)

Located right across the main entrance, our luggage space is available 24 hours with no time limit ⏰

🔑 Luggage Room Code: 1234*

You can freely store or pick up your luggage anytime before check-in or after check-out 😊

LUGGAGE SPACE DOOR PIN  1 2 3 4 *

Wi‑Fi Networks

1F ARA — SSID COZE_ARA / PIN joyjoyjoy
2F HTA — SSID KT_WiFi_5G_F3E6 / PIN fdfd1cc847

👶📡 Baby Monitor Available

Keep an eye on little ones or pets on another floor in real time.

📍 Where to find it
Baby-amenities cabinet (camera + monitor set)
🔌 Quick Start
Camera — plug in the USB power (DC 5 V) cable and leave it on.
Monitor — fully charge via USB-C, then use cord-free.
Hold the power button to pair; once connected, you’re ready to go.

🌿 Wellness Club ARA – Read Me First

🔥 Finnish Sauna – How to Operate

With the guest smartphone

1. Open the Diooist app.
2. Tap Power ON.
3. Tap the control button at bottom-right.
4. Set Target Temperature & Run Time.
Kids 60 °C · Adults 80 °C


On the control panel inside ARA

1. Press Power ON.
2. Tap Settings top-right.
3. Enter temperature & run time under Target.

Pre-heat at least 1 hour (80–90 °C)
Sit or lie on a towel; wipe sweat with a spare
Hydrate before and after each round—no alcohol or heavy meals
Stay ≤ 15 min per round; cool down 5–10 min between entries
Add only small ladles of water to stones; excess can damage the heater
Children only with adults, 60–70 °C, ≤ 5 min
Never sleep inside; leave the door unlatched for safety
Whisper only after 20:00, then switch the heater OFF and leave the door ajar to dry

🛀 Jacuzzi

Shower first to keep water clean.
Max 2 adults (or 3 kids)
Quiet hours begin 20:00; voices low, no music.
Limit each soak to ~20 min; rest between sessions.
No lotions, oils
Supervise children and seniors; keep water ≤ 38 °C for them.
Skip use if pregnant, on drowsy meds, or with heart issues.

🏋️ Smith Gym

Warm-up & stretch at least 5 min.
Wear clean athletic shoes—no sandals or bare feet.
Wipe all equipment with sanitizer after use.
Spotter needed for bench/overhead lifts > 40 kg.
Rack weights immediately; floor clear at all times.
Heavy free-weight zone: use with two people( guidance)
Hydrate frequently—water dispenser is in the lounge.
Kids under 16 must stay within arm’s reach.
No workouts after alcohol or straight from sauna/jacuzzi.
Report damage or odd noises via messenger; stop using that gear

🛋️ Social Lounge & Motion Beds

Daytime: bright family hang-out.
Night: sofa converts to two motion beds via remote

Extra mattresses/blankets in the cabinet behind the sofa

Privacy film blocks daytime view at the main door; close blackout curtain at night

Heating in ARA: no floor heating—use the provided electric radiators (dial 3 ≈ 22 °C)

🛏️ Extra Floor Bedding (2F)

Inside the built-in wardrobe in the 2F master bedroom, you’ll find two floor bedding sets (floor mattresses + blanket/duvet sets). You can lay them on the floor in the master bedroom or the office room 😊

📱 Guest Smartphone

Complimentary phone with Korean number & unlimited data/calls. Use it as a hotspot and open Coupang Eats, Kakao T, Naver Maps, and more.

💡 Local Tip
In Naver Map → Saved, browse our bookmarks for hidden-gem restaurants, markets, clinics, banks, and more. 🗺️📍

🍽️ Food Delivery

Open Coupang Eats on the guest phone.
Add items, screenshot the cart, and send via messenger.
We place & pay; you reimburse at checkout (cash or crypto).

🚖 IM MPV Taxi

Seats up to 7; fares about 30 % higher than a regular cab. Need multiple vans? Expect a short queue—just ask!

🍳 Kitchen & Appliances

A full kitchen includes: dishwasher, oven, water purifier.

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner
Type: Direct-flow purified water system
Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly
How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water.”
Benefit: Very safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking


☕ Capsule Coffee & Tea

Extra capsules are in the living-room tea-cabinet drawer—help yourself! Illy machine YouTube guides:

Quick Start ▶ https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G
Steam Milk ▶ https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo
Program Volume ▶ https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ Waste Disposal

Only General Waste and Recycling bins (near the kitchen).
Sort items; food scraps go down the disposer.

Tie full bags and place them in the hallway—do not take trash outside.

Message us; our team handles municipal disposal.

🧴 Amenities

30 sets of premium towels (face, body, foot).
Sauna/shower gowns are in ARA’s vanity room.
Hotel-quality toiletries: toothbrush, toothpaste, razor, cotton pads, etc.

💨 Ventilation

A heat-exchange ventilator runs 24/7 for fresh air without opening windows.

🌡️ Heating – Residence (2 F)

Floor-heating (ondol) thermostat—keep power ON, set around 22 °C. Use Away Mode if floors feel too warm.

🔇 Quiet Hours

Lower voices after 20:00, especially in ARA and near open windows.

🚭 Smoking

Indoor smoking is strictly prohibited; use the outdoor ashtray by the entrance.

🚗 Parking

One space on the 1 F pad. If the 3 F unit also parks, cars may be in tandem; message us if you need cars shuffled.

💬 Need Anything?

Questions or special requests? Message us anytime—our team replies promptly. 💬📱

Enjoy your stay at COZE HTA & Wellness Club ARA! We’re here to make every moment comfortable, restorative, and authentically local.

🍳 COZE Breakfast Grocery Delivery Option 🍎

COZE’s breakfast grocery delivery service is complimentary for stays of 4 nights or more.

For stays of 3 nights or less, this service is available as a paid option. Please message us if you would like to use it.

🕰 When & How It’s Delivered

Depending on the arrival time, the preparation may be slightly different.
For early or regular check-ins,
the breakfast groceries will be prepared inside the home, in the fridge and kitchen, before arrival.
For late check-ins,
they will be delivered to the main gate at 6 AM the following morning.

♻ After Unpacking

After unpacking everything,
please place the empty delivery bag back outside the gate for pick-up.
Cardboard boxes should go into the recycling bin ♻
Plastic wrap and packaging should go into regular trash 🚮

📲 Daily Breakfast Refills

Need more basic breakfast items during the stay?
Just send us a message.
Orders close every night at 9 PM,
and we’ll arrange delivery for the next morning.

💛 Complimentary Breakfast Staples from COZE

🥖 Bread • 🥛 Milk • 🥚 Eggs • 🧃 Juice • 🍎 Fruit • ☕ Coffee • 🍵 Tea

⚠️ Note on Complimentary Items
Complimentary breakfast staples are provided as a fixed basic selection and cannot be replaced with other items.
For example, bread cannot be exchanged for instant noodles, and milk cannot be exchanged for other drinks.

🛒 Anything Else on the List?

If additional items such as yogurt, snacks, special drinks, instant noodles, or anything else are needed, we’ll be happy to purchase them.

These additional items will be supplied at cost,
and the total will be added to the final bill at checkout.
Thank you for helping us keep everything smooth, comfortable, and sustainable 🌞

Warmly,
Guest Care Team
COZE Hospitality 3.0
All you want, All-In-One, All yours

🍽️ *How to Order Food with the Guest Smartphone* (Coupang Eats)

Welcome to COZE Hospitality 3.0! Here's the easy way to get your favorite dishes delivered — even if your own credit card won't work in Korea 👇


1️⃣ Grab the fully-set guest phone 📱
Open Coupang Eats (already logged in and location-ready).

2️⃣ Fill your cart with deliciousness 🍕🍜🥟
Browse local restaurants, add everything you'd like, mix and match freely!

3️⃣ Take a full scroll screenshot 🖼️
Before tapping "Pay," swipe through the entire cart and capture it (most phones: Power + Vol-Down → "Scroll Capture").

4️⃣ Send the screenshot to the Concierge chat 💬
Drop the image into your dedicated channel — we'll check and confirm right away.

5️⃣ We pay for you 💳✨
Our team places the order using a Korean card so your food heads straight to your door.

6️⃣ Settle up at checkout 💵
Simply reimburse us in cash when you check out.
Card or bank transfer is possible, but please note they trigger extra fees (double VAT on transfers and foreign-card surcharges). Cash is easiest and cheapest!


*Why this system?*
Korean apps require local authentication, so overseas cards are blocked. The guest phone lets you shop, but cannot charge your own card. Think of our card as a friendly loan — the exact food cost is passed back to you, not treated as COZE revenue.

Enjoy your meal and your stay! 🍽️🏠😊
Do we need to go higher

🚕✨ *COZE 1-to-1 Taxi Matching — Big-Fam Transport* ✨🚕

Got a squad bigger than your group chat? 📱👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Forget "taxi Tetris." With our 1-to-1 Taxi Matching Service your whole crew rolls together — smoothly, cheaply, and zero stress.

*💡 Why It's a Vibe*

💸 ₩0 service fee
Like, literally zero. Pay only what's on the meter — no cap.

🚐 Van-taxi + cab combos
Up to 7 seats per van, mixed with regular taxis so everyone (and every suitcase) has legroom.

🛵 Local rates
We haggle so you don't have to — same fare locals score.

🔔 Live updates
We slide into your chat with plate number & ETA the moment your ride's locked in.

*🕹️ How to Play*

🏠 Leaving home? Drop the destination. We'll spawn the perfect fleet.

📍 Out and about?
• Pop open Naver Map → turn on GPS → screenshot your pin.
• DM us the pic.
• Boom — ride confirmed, ETA incoming.

💳 Pay & go. Swipe any major card or tap that T-money. Done.

*Our pledge 🤝*
Seoul's transit maze shouldn't wreck family vibes. We fix it — totally free — so you focus on K-food hunts, palace pics, and TikTok memories.

COZE has your back. Travel happy, fam! 🎉

*Please keep these house rules* 🙏

Let our joy flow into peaceful nights for neighbors 🕊️

⏰ Check-in 3:00 PM
⏰ Check-out 11:00 AM (next day)

*🏡 Noise ZERO*
This is a very quiet residential area—even small sounds travel.
Keep all windows fully closed 🔒 (open windows carry sound farther).
After 19:00, noise over 65 dB for 5+ minutes will trigger a noise alarm 🚨
Please avoid slamming doors/furniture or running in the hallway.

*🛋️ Do not move furniture*
No furniture relocation. If an adjustment is truly needed, get prior approval from the host.

*🚭 Smoking*
No smoking indoors—it may trigger the IoT fire alarm.
Smoke only in designated outdoor areas and keep voices low at night.

*♻️ Trash & Recycling*
Separate general waste and recyclables (plastic/cans/bottles) and use the designated area.
*Food waste:* always use the food disposer; bones/hard shells/seeds → general waste 🥜
If you have a lot of food waste, bag it and leave it at the door at checkout—our house-care team will handle it 🙌

*🔒 Safety & Energy*
Be mindful of accidents related to heavy drinking 🤕
No fireworks/open flames—strictly prohibited 🚫🔥
Watch children on the stairs 👶
Right after check-in, take extra care until you're familiar with the space ⚠️
Turn off gas/lights/AC when leaving or checking out 🔌

*🚗 Parking*
Park only in spaces designated by our concierge.
Unauthorized/illegal parking may lead to neighbor complaints & fines; repeated issues jeopardize our business 😢

*🆘 Need help?*
Message us anytime or call Host Gaya at 010-6690-6935.
We respond 24/7. Thank you for your kindness! 🌙✨

Warmly,
Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

We recently attempted to process your payment, but the transaction was declined by your credit card company due to their security settings. Because our system processes these payments as overseas or "key-in" (manual entry) transactions, banks often block them automatically as a standard security measure.

To successfully process your payment and secure your booking, please take one of the following steps:

Via your banking app: Please check your card's security settings and temporarily lift any blocks on "Overseas Transactions" or "Manual/Key-in Payments."
Via customer service: Contact your bank or credit card company directly to authorize the payment.
Once you have adjusted your settings or spoken with your bank, please reply to this message so we can attempt the transaction again.
OR you can use WISE or GBP bank wire to us! We have the bank account in UK :)

Hello @Stany98 🌸,

Welcome to COZE Hospitality 3.0 — we’re so excited to host you today! 🏡✨

To make your check-in smooth and comfortable, could you kindly share a few details with us?

1. Arrival Time ⏰
What time do you expect to arrive at the house?


2. Arrival Method 🚗✈️🚆

Will you be coming directly from the airport (Incheon / Gimpo)?

Or from another accommodation / location in Seoul or Korea?



3. Transportation Details 🧳

Are you using an airport limousine bus, train, taxi, van, or driving yourself?

If you booked an airport transfer with us, please confirm your flight number & arrival time so we can track it for you.




💡 With this information, our team can better guide you with directions, assist with luggage arrangements, and be ready to welcome you at the right time.

Looking forward to your reply so we can prepare everything perfectly for your arrival 💕

Warm regards,
Gaya
Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

This parking lot is not an automated facility. It is personally managed by an elderly attendant, so he may not always be on-site.

If there is a barrier or guard at the entrance when you arrive, please move it to the side temporarily and park inside 🙏

Whenever you leave the parking lot, please make sure to return the barrier or guard to its original position. 

If it is left open and another vehicle parks there without permission, we may be charged for that vehicle’s parking fee as well, so we kindly ask that you follow this carefully 😊

This parking lot is not an automated facility. It is personally managed by an elderly attendant, so he may not always be on-site.

Goodmornig @188584162275518 👋

If your flight is at 8:45, you should arrive by at least 5:45. In that case, it would be best for you to leave at 5:00AM
Yes, we will need the 2nd complimentary van for that morning. So will they arrive here to the guest house by 4:30am to give us time to load up and be on the road by 5:00.

​I will arrange the second free van for that day.
​However, since you have 7 passengers and a lot of luggage, will one van be enough?

 If you'd like an additional van, we can book one for you for an extra charge. Please let me know!

Also, as this is an early morning departure, we ask that you please provide an early bird tip to the driver
Yes. One van will be enough because I still have a rental van. So it will be only half my family in the 2nd free van and half in my rental van. I will definitely make sure to tip the driver as well👍
